title: How Serving First Makes a Man Worth Following
caption:
Christ didn't lead by being served. He led by going first into the cost, the towel, the cross, the hard conversation nobody else wanted to have.

That's still the only leadership that lasts. The man everyone actually follows took the job no one wanted before he ever gave an order. He apologized before he was cornered into it. He showed up before the crisis, not just during it.

Leadership that only shows up when it's convenient isn't leadership. It's a title.

Go first. Into the cost, not just the credit.

#faith #leadership #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #discipline #christianity
theme: He leads by going first into the cost.
